content.text: The audit found a few concrete accessibility, metadata, and maintenance issues. I’m doing one final static cross-check of asset references and route metadata before reporting.

input.input:
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"printf '%s\\n' '--- tracked public assets ---' && git ls-files public && printf '%s\\n' '--- asset types ---' && file public/favicon.ico public/fonts/PlusJakartaSans-VariableFont_wght.woff2 && printf '%s\\n' '--- metadata and document structure references ---' && rg -n '<title>|canonical|og:image|twitter:image|<main|<body|<html|skip|prefers-reduced-motion|color-scheme|font-display|allEnvironments|quality' src README.md package.json && printf '%s\\n' '--- dependency/tool availability (read-only) ---' && test -d node_modules && echo 'node_modules present' || echo 'node_modules absent' && git diff --check && git status --short","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"if test -x node_modules/.bin/eslint; then node_modules/.bin/eslint .; else echo 'ESLint executable unavailable; skipped non-mutating lint.'; fi\nif test -x node_modules/.bin/tsc; then node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false; else echo 'TypeScript executable unavailable; skipped non-mutating type-check.'; fi\ngit status --short","workdir":"/Users/yusoofsh/Developer/Community/leenk","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

content.text:
Read-only audit complete; no files changed.

1. **P1 — continuous motion ignores reduced-motion preference.**  
   `src/components/background.tsx:46-49`, `src/components/background.tsx:123-148` run three infinite star animations (and parallax) for every visitor, with no `prefers-reduced-motion` path. This can cause vestibular/accessibility issues and unnecessary GPU/battery use. Minimal fix: use Motion’s reduced-motion hook or a CSS media query to stop the animations and mouse parallax.

2. **P1 — share-preview image is broken/missing.**  
   `src/layouts/index.astro:56-57` supplies only `og:image:alt`, while `src/layouts/index.astro:142` references `/og-image.jpg`; `git ls-files public` confirms no such asset exists. Social cards will have no valid image. Minimal fix: add the image to `public/` and declare absolute `og:image` plus `twitter:image`, or remove the dangling structured-data image/alt metadata.

3. **P2 — documented quality command currently fails on generated Wrangler files.**  
   `eslint.config.js:53-60` omits `.wrangler/`, though `.gitignore:7-8` recognizes it as generated. Non-mutating `node_modules/.bin/eslint .` failed with six `parserOptions.project` errors under `.wrangler/tmp/...`; because `package.json:11` uses `eslint --fix . && ...`, `npm run quality` also stops before Prettier. Minimal fix: add `**/.wrangler/**` to ESLint ignores (or lint only source/config paths). Separate non-mutating `lint` and `format:check` scripts from the fixing command.

4. **P2 — 404 response inherits homepage SEO metadata.**  
   `src/pages/404.astro:5` renders the shared layout, whose fixed homepage `<title>` and canonical are at `src/layouts/index.astro:38,101`. A missing page therefore presents as the homepage in the tab and advertises the root canonical. Minimal fix: let `Layout` accept title/canonical/robots props; set a 404 title and `noindex`.

5. **P3 — favicon metadata is internally inconsistent.**  
   `src/layouts/index.astro:14` declares `favicon.ico` as `image/svg+xml`; the actual asset is ICO (`public/favicon.ico`). Minimal fix: use `/favicon.ico` and `type="image/x-icon"`.

6. **P3 — keyboard bypass support is absent.**  
   `src/layouts/index.astro:181-186` has `<main>` but no skip link or stable target ID. Minimal fix: add a visually-hidden-on-idle “Skip to content” link and `id="main-content"` on `<main>`.

Verification: static inspection of all `src/` and `public/` files; `tsc --noEmit` completed silently. I did not build because this was explicitly read-only and builds generate artifacts.
